# Can I Use: Parquet Format Support Matrix

A comprehensive compatibility reference for Apache Parquet features across libraries and query engines.
**This matrix is auto-generated by running actual tests against each library version.**

---

## Tools & Versions Tested

| Tool | Latest Version | Versions Tested | Language |
|---|---|---|---|
| PyArrow | 23.0.1 | 59 versions (0.2.0 вЂ“ 23.0.1) | Python |
| fastparquet | 2025.12.0 | 47 versions (0.0.1 вЂ“ 2025.12.0) | Python |
| Polars | 1.38.1 | 374 versions (0.0.1 вЂ“ 1.38.1) | Rust / Python |
| DuckDB | 1.4.4 | 59 versions (0.0.0 вЂ“ 1.4.4) | C++ |
| parquet-rs | 55.2.0 | 110 versions (0.1.0 вЂ“ 58.0.0) | Rust |
| parquet-go | 0.24.0 | 18 versions (0.17.0 вЂ“ 0.28.0) | Go |
| arrow-go | 18.3.0 | 1 version (18.3.0 вЂ“ 18.3.0) | Go |
| parquet-java | parquet-mr version 1.15.0 (build 4665401d36e468c988322f78621da7c2d1c22ede) | 27 versions (1.7.0 вЂ“ 1.17.0) | Java |
| parquet-dotnet | 5.0.0.0 | 148 versions (1.0.114 вЂ“ 5.5.0) | C# / .NET |
| ParquetSharp | 21.0.0.0 | 25 versions (1.4.0.1 вЂ“ 21.0.0) | C# / .NET |
| hyparquet | 1.0.0 | 1 version (1.0.0 вЂ“ 1.0.0) | JavaScript |

## How to Reproduce

```bash
cd parquet_can_i_use
python run_multiversion.py  # Test multiple versions
python generate_matrix.py --load-results  # Generate matrix from results
```

*Auto-generated from verified test results.*
